tags.note: subtle, muddy/marshy. It disapears and reappears a lot, and often has many bits either side of streams and rivers

tags.description: very boggy and hardly visible route, we went there after relatively nice days (for Scotland) it was still basically a swamp, took ages and we definitely don't recommend going that way. From Meanach it's nice again.
